titleStmt.title: Paris, Bibliothèque nationale de France, Pauline Epistles in BnF Éthiopien 45 / BnF Éthiopien 165
Pauline Epistles

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msIdentifier.idno: Pauline Epistles in BnF Éthiopien 45 / BnF Éthiopien 165

condition.note: Several leaves are missing between fols 8–9, twelve of them are preserved in . 9 is mutilated.

history.provenance: Belonged to Pierre Séguier, after whose death it was kept at the library of Abbaye de Saint-Germain-des-Prés and came to the Bibliothèque nationale de France during the French Revolution .

bibl.title: Catalogue des manuscrits éthiopiens (gheez et amharique) de la Bibliothèque nationale
Manuscrits Orientaux

msItem.title: Pauline Epistles
msItem.note: The text of this manuscript differs from the Biblical Society edition, Novum testamentum domini nostri et servatoris Jesu Christi aethiopiceThomas PellPlattLondiniImpressit Ricardus Watts1830https://archive.org/details/novumtestamentu00platgoogManuscriptsNew Testamentbm:Platt1830novumManuscriptsNew Testamentbm:Platt1830novum. It agrees mostly with that of Testamentum Novum: Cum Epistola Pauli Ad Hebreos tantum, cum concordantijs Evangelistarum Eusebii & numeratione omnium verborum eorundem. Missale cum benedictione incensi cerae et c. Alphabetum in lingua ግእዝ፡ gheez, idest libera quia a nulla alia originem duxit, & vulgo dicitur Chaldea, Quae omnia Fr. Petrus Ethyops auxilio piorum sedente Paulo. III. Pont. MAx. & Claudio illius regni Imperatore imprimi curavitPetrus EthyopsRomaeImpensis Petri Comos Ethiopis, Valerius Doricus1548https://books.google.de/books?id=KPNa9Mc5gjYCEthiopicNew Testamentbm:Petrus1548TestEthiopicNew Testamentbm:Petrus1548Test.

colophon.note: According to Äthiopische PaläographieÄthiopistische ForschungenSiegbertUhligStuttgartFranz Steiner Verlag GmbH1988Äthiopistische Forschungen2222CodicologyEthiopicPalaeographybm:Uhlig1988PalaographieCodicologyEthiopicPalaeographybm:Uhlig1988Palaographie392, the colophon is on fol. 163r. This is probably a mistake since Catalogue des manuscrits éthiopiens (gheez et amharique) de la Bibliothèque nationaleManuscrits OrientauxHermannZotenbergParisImprimerie nationale1877Manuscrits Orientauxhttps://archive.org/details/manuscritsorient00biblEthiopicCataloguingBibliothèque Nationalebm:Zotenberg1877CatalogueEthiopicCataloguingBibliothèque Nationalebm:Zotenberg1877Catalogue44 states that the manuscript has 162 leafs and Äthiopische PaläographieÄthiopistische ForschungenSiegbertUhligStuttgartFranz Steiner Verlag GmbH1988Äthiopistische Forschungen2222CodicologyEthiopicPalaeographybm:Uhlig1988PalaographieCodicologyEthiopicPalaeographybm:Uhlig1988Palaographie393 also places it on fol. 162r.

The colophon at the end of the manuscript states that it has been produced in Jerusalem, 38 Year of Grace, under the order of the superior of the Convent, Gabra Krǝstos. See also Äthiopische PaläographieÄthiopistische ForschungenSiegbertUhligStuttgartFranz Steiner Verlag GmbH1988Äthiopistische Forschungen2222CodicologyEthiopicPalaeographybm:Uhlig1988PalaographieCodicologyEthiopicPalaeographybm:Uhlig1988Palaographie392–393.

msItem.title: ለብሔረ፡ ሮሜ።
msItem.explicit: ተፈጸመ፡ ዘሮሜ፡ ወተጽሕፈ፡ በቆሮንቶስ፡ ወተፈነወ፡ በእደ፡ ፊቤን፡ እንተ፡ ትትለአኮሙ፡ ለማኅበረ፡ ከንክራን። ቃሉ፡ ፱፻ወ፶፡ ወምዕራፉ፡ ፲ወ፱፡ ለብሔረ፡ ሮሜ።

note.p: 12 of the missing leaves are contained in No item: BNFet165#p4.

msItem.title: ለብሔረ፡ ቆሮንቶስ።
ለሰብአ፡ ቆሮንቶስ፡ ወተጽሕፈ፡ እንዘ፡ ሀሎ፡ ብሔረ፡ ፊልጶስ።
msItem.explicit: ተጽሕፈት፡ በፊልጵስዩስ፡ ዘመቅዶንያ፡ ወተፈነወ፡ በእደ፡ ቲቶ፡ ወሉቃስ። ቃሉ፡ ፯፻፶፭፡ ወምዕራፉ፡ ፲። ለሰብአ፡ ቆሮቶስ፡ ፪።

msItem.title: ለሰብአ፡ ገላቲያ፡ ወተጽሕፈ፡ እንዘ፡ ሀሎ፡ ብሔረ፡ ሮሜ።
msItem.explicit: ተፈጸመ፡ ዘሰብአ፡ ገላቲያ፡ ወተጽሕፈ፡ በብሔረ፡ ሮሜ። ቃሉ፡ ፫፻፲፪፡ ወምዕራፉ፡ ፲፬።

msItem.title: ለሰብአ፡ ኤፌሶን።
msItem.explicit: ተፈነወ፡ በእደ፡ ጢኪቆስ። ቃሉ፡ ፲፻፲ወ፪፡ ወምዕራፉ፡ ፲። ለሰብአ፡ ኤፌስን።

msItem.title: ለሰብአ፡ ፊልጵስዩስ። ወተጽሕፈ፡ እንዘ፡ ሀሎ፡ ብሔረ፡ ሮሜ።
msItem.explicit: ተፈነወ፡ በእደ፡ አፍሮዲጡ። ቃሉ፡ ፪፻፲ወ፪፡ ወምዕራፉ፡ ፯። ለሰብአ፡ ፊልጵስዩስ።

msItem.title: ለሰብአ፡ ቈላስይስ። ወተጽሕፈ፡ እንዘ፡ ሀሎ፡ ብሔረ፡ ሮሜ።
msItem.explicit: ወተጽሐፈ፡ በብሔረ፡ ሮሜ፡ ወተፈነወ፡ በእደ፡ ጢኪቆስ። ቃሉ፡ ፫፻፲ወ፬፡ ወምዕራፉ፡ ፲። ለሰብአ፡ ቈላስይስ።

msItem.title: ለሰብአ፡ ተስሎንቄ። ወተጽሕፈ፡ እንዘ፡ ሀሎ፡ ብሔረ፡ አቴና።
msItem.explicit: ተፈጸመ፡ ዘተስሎንቄ፡ ቃሉ፡ ፪፻፲ወ፪፡ ወምዕራፉ፡ ፯።

msItem.title: ለሰብአ፡ ተስሎንቄ። ወተጽሕፈ፡ እንዘ፡ ሀሎ፡ ብሔረ፡ ሮሜ።
msItem.explicit: ተጽሕፈ፡ በአቴና። ቃሉ፡ ፻፹፡ ወምዕራፉ፡ ፭። ለሰብአ፡ ተስሎንቄ።

msItem.title: ለሰብአ፡ ዕብራዊያን።
msItem.explicit: ተፈነወ፡ በእደ፡ ጢሞቴዎስ። ቃሉ፡ ፫፻፵፯፡ ወምዕራፉ፡ ፳፫። ለሰብአ፡ ዕብራዊያን።

msItem.title: ለጢሞቴዎስ። ወተጽሕፈ፡ እንዘ፡ ሀሎ፡ ብሔረ፡ ሎዶቅያ።
ለጢሞቴዎስ። ወተጽሕፈ፡ እንዘ፡ ሀሎ፡ ሎዎዶቅያ።
ለቲቶ። ወተጽሕፈ፡ እንዘ፡ ሀሎ፡ ብሔረ፡ ቍጵሊዮስ።
ለፊልሞና። ወተጽሕፈ፡ እንዘ፡ ሀሎ፡ ብሔረ፡ ሮሜ።
msItem.explicit: ተፈጸመ፡ በዝየ፡ ቃሉ፡ ፵ወ፯፡ ወምዕራፉ፡ ፪።

condition.note: Several leaves are missing between fols 8–9, . 9 is mutilated.

item.desc:
Donation note stating that when Giyorgis, of the daqiqa ʾEwosṭātewos, was superior of the Convent of Jerusalem, Bǝrhāna Masqal, "son" of Tādewos of Bartaqarwā (Cerulli Bartǝrwā) (maybe Tādewos), gave several cult objects to the church and commissioned a volume of Taʾammǝra Māryām.
Etiopi in Palestina: Storia della comunità etiopica di GerusalemmeCollezione scientifica e documentaria a cura dell'Ufficio studi del Ministero dell’Africa ItalianaEnricoCerulliRomaLa Libreria dello Stato1947Collezione scientifica e documentaria a cura dell'Ufficio studi del Ministero dell’Africa Italiana14II14bm:Cerulli1947EtiopiIIbm:Cerulli1947EtiopiII397
Etiopi in Palestina: Storia della comunità etiopica di GerusalemmeCollezione scientifica e documentaria a cura dell'Ufficio studi del Ministero dell’Africa ItalianaEnricoCerulliRomaLa Libreria dello Stato1947Collezione scientifica e documentaria a cura dell'Ufficio studi del Ministero dell’Africa Italiana14II14bm:Cerulli1947EtiopiIIbm:Cerulli1947EtiopiII398
The lessons are sometimes marked at the top of the pages.

bibl.title: Catalogue des manuscrits éthiopiens (gheez et amharique) de la Bibliothèque nationale
Manuscrits Orientaux

msItem.title: Epistle to the Romans
msItem.note: These leaves belonged originally to part 1.

msItem.title: Romans 4:16b-5:19b
msItem.note: The scribe's Vorlage had two misplaced leaves.

supportDesc.collation: have been detached from and been inserted into Paris, Bibliothèque nationale de France, BnF Éthiopien 165.

bibl.title: Catalogue des manuscrits éthiopiens (gheez et amharique) de la Bibliothèque nationale
Manuscrits Orientaux

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:div.t:ab:
Passages omitted by Hermann Zotenberg conform to those in Novum testamentum domini nostri et servatoris Jesu Christi aethiopiceThomas PellPlattLondiniImpressit Ricardus Watts1830https://archive.org/details/novumtestamentu00platgoogManuscriptsNew Testamentbm:Platt1830novumManuscriptsNew Testamentbm:Platt1830novum.
ጳውሎስ፡ ዘተሠይመ፡ ሐዋርያሁ፡ ለኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ለፈቃደ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ወስስቴንስ፡ እኁነ፡
ለቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ዘእግዚአብሔር፡ ዘብሔረ፡ ቆሮንቶስ፡ ለእለ፡ ተቀደሱ፡ በክርስቶስ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ወተሰምዩ፡ ቅዱሳነ፡ ወለኵሎሙ፡ እለ፡ ይጼውዑ፡ ስሞ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ እግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ በኵሉ፡ በሐውርቲሆሙ፡ ወለነሂ፡ ምስሌሆሙ።
ሰላም፡ ለክሙ፡ ወፍሥሐ፡ እምኀበ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አቡነ፡
ዘወሀበክሙ፡ በኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ።
እስመ፡ በኵሉ፡ ብዕልክሙ፡ በእንቲአሁ፡ በቃል፡ ወበምግባር፡ ወበኵሉ፡ ጥበብ።
ወበከመ፡ ጸንዐ፡
ከመ፡ ኢትሕጥኡ፡ ምንተኒ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ እንዘ፡ ትሴፈው፡ ምጽአቶ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ እግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡
ዘያጸንዐነ፡ ለዝሉፉ፡ በዕለተ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ።
ሱቱፋነ፡ በወልዱ፡
ከመ፡ በኵሉ፡ ታድልዉ፡ ሎቱ፡ ወከመ፡ ትተክዙ። ወካዕበ፡ ትጽንዑ፡ በአሐዱ፡ ምክር፡
አኀዊነ፡ ሰብአ፡ ክልኤስ፡ ከመ፡ ትትከሐዱ፡ ወትብሉ፡ በበይናቲክሙ፡

Passages omitted by Hermann Zotenberg conform to those in Novum testamentum domini nostri et servatoris Jesu Christi aethiopiceThomas PellPlattLondiniImpressit Ricardus Watts1830https://archive.org/details/novumtestamentu00platgoogManuscriptsNew Testamentbm:Platt1830novumManuscriptsNew Testamentbm:Platt1830novum.
ወይእዜኒ፡ አኀዊነ፡ ንነግረክሙ፡ ናስተበቍዐክሙ፡ በእግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ከመ፡ ዘከመ፡ ተአዘዝክሙ፡ በኀቤነ፡ በዘ፡ ተሐውሩ፡ በዘ፡ ይደሉ፡ ወተሠምርዎ፡ ከመ፡ ትብዝኁ፡ ወትፈድፍዱ፡
ወታአምሩ፡
ፈቃዱ፡ ከመ፡ ትዕቀቡ፡ ከመ፡ ያእምር፡ ለለ፡ አሐዱ፡ በቅድሳት፡ ወታክብሩ፡ ርእስክሙ፡ እምዝሙት፡
በእንተ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዝንቱ፡ በከመ፡ አቅደምኩ፡ ነጊሮትክሙ፡ ወአስምዕ፡ ለክሙ
ለሰብእ፡ ዘክሕደ፡ ዘእንበለ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ዘወሀበነ፡ መንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ። አንትሙ፡ ለአፍቅሮ፡ ቢጽክሙ።
ወትገብርዎሂ፡ ምስለ፡ ኵሉ፡ አኀዊክሙ፡ በኵሉ፡ መቄዶንያ፡ ወትፈደፍዱ፡ በአፍቅሮ፡ ወበክብር፡ የዋሀነ፡ ትኩኑ፡ ወትግበሩ፡
ከመ፡ ትሖሩ፡ በኂሩት፡ ወበርትዕ፡ በቅድመ፡ እለ፡ አፍአ፡ ወኢትጽሀቅዎ፡ ወኢለመኑሂ።

Passages omitted by Hermann Zotenberg conform to those in Novum testamentum domini nostri et servatoris Jesu Christi aethiopiceThomas PellPlattLondiniImpressit Ricardus Watts1830https://archive.org/details/novumtestamentu00platgoogManuscriptsNew Testamentbm:Platt1830novumManuscriptsNew Testamentbm:Platt1830novum.
በብዙኅ፡ ነገር፡ ወበብዙኅ፡ መክፈልት፡ በነቢያቲሁ፡
ወበደኀሪ፡ መዋዕል፡ ነገረ፡ በእንተ፡ ወልዱ። ዘረሰዮ፡ ወራሴ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ዘበእንቲአሁ፡ ፈጠሮ፡ ለዓለም።
አርአያሁ፡ ከመ፡ ይግነይ፡ ኵሉ፡ ለቃለ፡ ኀይሉ። ወውእቱ፡ ጸዋሬ፡ ኵሉ፡ ወገብረ፡ በእንቲአሁ፡ በዘ፡ ያነጽሕ፡ ኀጢአተ፡ ወነበረ፡ በየማነ፡ ዕበዩ፡ በሰማያት።
እንዘ፡ መጠነዝ፡ ኀየሶ፡ እመላእክት፡ ወዐቢዮ፡ እምኔሆሙ፡ ወስሙሰ፡ ለወረሲ፡ ክቡር፡ ውእቱ።
